name: Minty Fresh Fruity Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pint Strawberries, washed, hulled, and sliced
1/4 cup Packed mint leaves, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large serving bowl, combine the chopped cantaloupe, blueberries, mint strips, orange juice, and honey.
2. Lightly toss the ingredients together.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate until ready to serve.
